powpow/loop

  • Exports

This module implements the core event loop and timer wheel. It can be used to build custom event-driven applications or as the foundation for higher-level abstractions like HTTP servers, WebSocket servers, etc.

The loop uses a hierarchical timer wheel for efficient timer management, and supports edge-triggered I/O events. The API is designed to be minimal and efficient, with a focus on low-latency event handling and minimal overhead.

Imports

platform, types

Types

FdWatcher = ref object
  fd*: int
  events*: set[EventType]
  callback*: FdCallback
  edgeTriggered*: bool
Loop = ref object
  platform*: Platform
  bufPool*: seq[ptr UncheckedArray[byte]]

Procs

proc addIdle(loop: Loop; cb: Callback): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc addInterval(loop: Loop; intervalMs: int; callback: TimerCallback): TimerId {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc addTimer(loop: Loop; delayMs: int; callback: TimerCallback): TimerId {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc cancelTimer(loop: Loop; id: TimerId) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc close(loop: Loop) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc deferCall(loop: Loop; cb: Callback) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isRunning(loop: Loop): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc modify(loop: Loop; fd: int; events: set[EventType]) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, OSError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newLoop(): Loop {....raises: [OSError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
proc poll(loop: Loop; timeoutMs: int = -1) {.inline, ...raises: [Exception],
    tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
proc register(loop: Loop; fd: int; events: set[EventType]; callback: FdCallback;
              edgeTriggered = false) {....raises: [KeyError, OSError], tags: [],
                                       forbids: [].}
proc removeIdle(loop: Loop; id: int) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc run(loop: Loop) {....raises: [Exception], tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect],
                       forbids: [].}
proc runOnce(loop: Loop) {....raises: [Exception], tags: [TimeEffect, RootEffect],
                           forbids: [].}
proc stop(loop: Loop) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc unregister(loop: Loop; fd: int) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc unregisterFd(loop: Loop; fd: int) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Remove fd watcher without platform syscall. The fd was already closed by the caller, and the OS removes it from epoll/kqueue automatically. Only cleans up in-memory state.

Exports

TimerCallback, ==, Callback, FdCallback, EventType, TimerId
